summary: The implementation appears to be highly comprehensive and closely aligned with the BuildRequest. All 17 requirements have been implemented with strong evidence in the diff. The dark luxury theme, glassmorphism styling, smooth animations, all content sections, backend lead capture, and responsive design are present. Minor gaps exist around explicit parallax effects visibility and calendar booking placeholder implementation details.

missing_requirements.requirement: Parallax effects are visible on scroll
missing_requirements.reason: While smooth animations and micro-interactions are implemented in CSS (animate-fade-in, hover-lift, gradient animations), explicit parallax scroll effects are not evident in the truncated diff. The CSS includes animation utilities but no clear parallax-on-scroll implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Calendar booking integration placeholder is present
missing_requirements.reason: The ContactSection.tsx is truncated, and while the requirement mentions a calendar booking placeholder, the visible portion only shows the contact form, WhatsApp button, and form submission logic. The placeholder implementation is not visible in the truncated content.
